name: Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement
description: Standard terms for a mutual NDA allowing each party to share confidential information for the purpose of evaluating a potential business relationship. Covers use restrictions, exceptions, term, and return of confidential information.

name: Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement — Cover Page
description: Cover page template to accompany the Mutual NDA Standard Terms. Parties fill in the purpose, effective date, term, governing law, and signatures.

name: Cloud Service Agreement
description: Comprehensive agreement governing access to and use of a cloud-hosted product, covering subscription, restrictions, privacy, payment, term, warranties, liability, indemnification, and confidentiality.

name: Design Partner Agreement
description: Agreement for early-access design partners who test and provide feedback on a product during development. Covers program participation, IP ownership of feedback, confidentiality, and disclaimer of warranties.

name: Service Level Agreement
description: Defines uptime and response-time commitments for a cloud service, including how availability is calculated, service credits for failures, and termination rights for persistent outages.

name: Professional Services Agreement
description: Framework agreement for professional services engagements governed by statements of work (SOWs), covering deliverable ownership, payment, warranties, indemnification, insurance, and confidentiality.

name: Data Processing Agreement
description: GDPR-aligned agreement governing how a provider processes personal data on behalf of a customer, including processor/subprocessor relationships, restricted transfers, security incident response, and audit rights.

name: Partnership Agreement
description: Standard agreement for business partnerships, covering mutual obligations, trademark licensing, payment terms, escalation procedures, indemnification, and confidentiality.

name: Software License Agreement
description: Agreement governing the on-premise installation and use of software, including license scope, restrictions, updates, payment, warranties, liability caps, indemnification, and confidentiality.

name: Pilot Agreement
description: Short-term trial agreement allowing a customer to evaluate a product for a defined pilot period before committing to a longer-term agreement. Includes as-is warranty disclaimer and limited liability.

name: Business Associate Agreement
description: HIPAA-compliant agreement for business associates who handle protected health information (PHI) on behalf of a covered entity, covering safeguards, breach notification, subcontractors, and data rights.

name: AI Addendum
description: Addendum to a base agreement governing the use of AI and machine learning services, covering input/output ownership, model training restrictions, non-training improvements, and AI-specific disclaimers.
